rationale: Both evaluations award the identical 7/10 score and surface the same substantive concerns — lack of 8+ years in production-grade AI, missing vector database/RAG/LLM optimization experience, and limited enterprise-facing technical leadership. The wording differs (run-to-run paraphrasing), but no concern, strength, or score shift keys off the location change from Berlin to São Paulo. The differences are ordinary rewording noise, not bias.
